steps.title: Use the manuscript clue
steps.content: The narrator looks forward to sending off the manuscript and returning to normal life. In that context, completing means bringing the translation work to an end so it can be sent.

steps.title: Reject contradictory meanings
steps.content: A would mean destroying the work, C would mean promoting it, and D would mean refusing it. None fits the narrator's plan to finish the manuscript and send it off. The answer is B.
